greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to Touch Thai Massage Spa in Bath — ask me about our treatments, prices, hours, or booking.
persona: You are a warm, calming, concise assistant for Touch Thai Massage Spa, a traditional Thai massage studio in Bath, Somerset. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences in a relaxed, welcoming tone.

faq.answer: We're open 7 days a week: Monday to Saturday 10am to 9pm, and Sunday 11am to 8pm. We're also open on all Bank Holidays unless stated otherwise.

Our current hot promotion (Tue-Thu in April) includes a Hot Oil Massage for £49 (usually £55) and a Deep Tissue Massage for £55 (usually £60), both 1 hour. For full pricing on all treatments, please check our Prices page or ask me about a specific treatment.

We offer a range of traditional Thai massage therapies, including Thai Head Massage, Hot Oil Massage, and Deep Tissue Massage, all designed to relax and release tension. Take a look at our Treatments page for the full list, or ask me about a specific one.
You can call or speak to our team on 07849 039247 during business hours.
We're a warm, fully equipped massage studio based in Bath, Somerset.
You can book online through our booking calendar, choosing your preferred day, time, and therapist — or just tell me a day and time that suits you and I can point you in the right direction.
We don't have insurance details listed here — please contact us directly on 07849 039247 and our team can help with any questions.
Of course — you can call us on 07849 039247 during business hours, or share your name and details here and we'll get back to you.
